seoTitle: Fernihurst vs Ferntree Gully — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Fernihurst and Ferntree Gully. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Fernihurst vs Ferntree Gully: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Fernihurst and Ferntree Gully.
heading: Fernihurst vs Ferntree Gully — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Fernihurst, Victoria and Ferntree Gully, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Fernihurst has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Ferntree Gully (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Fernihurst or Ferntree Gully safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Fernihurst has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Ferntree Gully scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Fernihurst scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Ferntree Gully scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Fernihurst or Ferntree Gully?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Fernihurst has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.93% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
